members.name: BlendMode
members.summary: The manner in which a material's rendering is applied to underlying textures.

members.name: LightMode
members.summary: The manner in which material reacts to lighting.

members.name: ParticlesAnimHFrames
members.summary: The number of columns in the spritesheet assigned as [Texture2D] for a [GPUParticles2D] or [CPUParticles2D]. [b]Note:[/b] This property is only used and visible in the editor if [member particles_animation] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: ParticlesAnimLoop
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the particles animation will loop. [b]Note:[/b] This property is only used and visible in the editor if [member particles_animation] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: ParticlesAnimVFrames
members.summary: The number of rows in the spritesheet assigned as [Texture2D] for a [GPUParticles2D] or [CPUParticles2D]. [b]Note:[/b] This property is only used and visible in the editor if [member particles_animation] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: ParticlesAnimation
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], enable spritesheet-based animation features when assigned to [GPUParticles2D] and [CPUParticles2D] nodes. The [member ParticleProcessMaterial.anim_speed_max] or [member CPUParticles2D.anim_speed_max] should also be set to a positive value for the animation to play. This property (and other [code]particles_anim_*[/code] properties that depend on it) has no effect on other types of nodes.

values.name: BLEND_MODE_MIX
values.summary: Mix blending mode. Colors are assumed to be independent of the alpha (opacity) value.

values.name: BLEND_MODE_PREMULT_ALPHA
values.summary: Mix blending mode. Colors are assumed to be premultiplied by the alpha (opacity) value.

values.name: LIGHT_MODE_LIGHT_ONLY
values.summary: Render the material as if there were only light.

values.name: LIGHT_MODE_NORMAL
values.summary: Render the material using both light and non-light sensitive material properties.

values.name: LIGHT_MODE_UNSHADED
values.summary: Render the material as if there were no light.

constants.name: BLEND_MODE_MIX
constants.summary: Mix blending mode. Colors are assumed to be independent of the alpha (opacity) value.

constants.name: BLEND_MODE_PREMULT_ALPHA
constants.summary: Mix blending mode. Colors are assumed to be premultiplied by the alpha (opacity) value.

constants.name: LIGHT_MODE_NORMAL
constants.summary: Render the material using both light and non-light sensitive material properties.

constants.name: LIGHT_MODE_UNSHADED
constants.summary: Render the material as if there were no light.

constants.name: LIGHT_MODE_LIGHT_ONLY
constants.summary: Render the material as if there were only light.
